response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music was present, so the reference JSON was only used for scene and character confirmation. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed manually from the English audio dialogue because the reference JSON did not contain a transcript of the spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed accurately to match the fast-paced, high-energy voice-overs, including screams and prompt card visuals.

subtitles.original: An interrogation process where even the slightest inconsistencies in a statement must be detected to get closer to the truth.
subtitles.english: An interrogation process where even the slightest inconsistencies in a statement must be detected to get closer to the truth.

subtitles.original: Can Justice remain unaffected by the situation and accurately draw out the information?
subtitles.english: Can Justice remain unaffected by the situation and accurately draw out the information?

subtitles.original: [Q. Are you good at interrogations?]
subtitles.english: [Q. Are you good at interrogations?]

subtitles.original: Yeah, I'm the best actually. I have a gun, and I know how to use it, so...
subtitles.english: Yeah, I'm the best actually. I have a gun, and I know how to use it, so...

subtitles.original: Easy! Don't worry about it, I have my ways. I've been here for so long, it's going to be the easiest case of my life.
subtitles.english: Easy! Don't worry about it, I have my ways. I've been here for so long, it's going to be the easiest case of my life.

subtitles.original: [Q. Are you good at interrogations?]
subtitles.english: [Q. Are you good at interrogations?]

subtitles.original: No, I don't think so. Because my heart is too pure, and my ass is too fat, and I'm not a gaslighter like Cecilia Immergreen.
subtitles.english: No, I don't think so. Because my heart is too pure, and my ass is too fat, and I'm not a gaslighter like Cecilia Immergreen.

subtitles.original: I'm not very confident, but I'll do my best.
subtitles.english: I'm not very confident, but I'll do my best.

subtitles.original: Well, well, well, little criminal. We are about to begin your interrogation!
subtitles.english: Well, well, well, little criminal. We are about to begin your interrogation!

subtitles.original: Wait a minute! I'm not a criminal! Why me? I haven't done anything. What exactly have I been accused of?
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! I'm not a criminal! Why me? I haven't done anything. What exactly have I been accused of?

subtitles.original: That... That would be the suspected identity fraud, and the unlawful acquisition of personal...
subtitles.english: That... That would be the suspected identity fraud, and the unlawful acquisition of personal...

subtitles.original: Come on, Gigi! ...of Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: Come on, Gigi! ...of Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.original: I don't know anything about that! I'm innocent! Who is Nerissa Ravencroft?
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about that! I'm innocent! Who is Nerissa Ravencroft?

subtitles.original: Have you ever seen Nerissa Ravencroft? You know who Nerissa Ravencroft is.
subtitles.english: Have you ever seen Nerissa Ravencroft? You know who Nerissa Ravencroft is.

subtitles.original: No, I've never seen her in my life.
subtitles.english: No, I've never seen her in my life.

subtitles.original: Blue, black, long hair, red eyes?
subtitles.english: Blue, black, long hair, red eyes?

subtitles.original: If I have ever saw such a maiden, I would call her a princess. She sounds like one.
subtitles.english: If I have ever saw such a maiden, I would call her a princess. She sounds like one.

subtitles.original: Well, we have evidence, we have evidence! We have evidence!
subtitles.english: Well, we have evidence, we have evidence! We have evidence!

subtitles.original: Does the name 99_X3_XD ring a bell to you?
subtitles.english: Does the name 99_X3_XD ring a bell to you?

subtitles.original: Oh, yes. Because 99_X3_XD is me.
subtitles.english: Oh, yes. Because 99_X3_XD is me.

subtitles.original: Ah! I knew it!
subtitles.english: Ah! I knew it!

subtitles.original: You are the prime suspect in the stalking incident!
subtitles.english: You are the prime suspect in the stalking incident!

subtitles.original: Of Nerissa Ravencroft! We have it!
subtitles.english: Of Nerissa Ravencroft! We have it!

subtitles.original: We have it on paper right here, and we have all the chat logs that you put in Nerissa Ravencroft's channel right here.
subtitles.english: We have it on paper right here, and we have all the chat logs that you put in Nerissa Ravencroft's channel right here.

subtitles.original: I don't know, I watch, I watch a lot of virtual entertainers.
subtitles.english: I don't know, I watch, I watch a lot of virtual entertainers.

subtitles.original: Nerissa Ravencroft, I'm outside of your house right now.
subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, I'm outside of your house right now.

subtitles.original: Nerissa Ravencroft, I see you from the window.
subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, I see you from the window.

subtitles.original: Nerissa Ravencroft, take off your shirt. Whoa, now.
subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, take off your shirt. Whoa, now.

subtitles.original: That was all you! I don't know about that.
subtitles.english: That was all you! I don't know about that.

subtitles.original: I think you are mistaken. I would never speak that way to a princess.
subtitles.english: I think you are mistaken. I would never speak that way to a princess.

subtitles.original: Tell her that we're never going to give her donuts ever again.
subtitles.english: Tell her that we're never going to give her donuts ever again.

subtitles.original: And you will never have donuts ever again!
subtitles.english: And you will never have donuts ever again!

subtitles.original: And I will never have... Donuts?! How did you know I like donuts?!
subtitles.english: And I will never have... Donuts?! How did you know I like donuts?!

subtitles.original: No more donuts! No more donuts!
subtitles.english: No more donuts! No more donuts!

subtitles.original: But, but, if you, if you just confess, we have an in with Nerissa Ravencroft.
subtitles.english: But, but, if you, if you just confess, we have an in with Nerissa Ravencroft.

subtitles.original: Yeah, offer her a good deal. We can give you what you want.
subtitles.english: Yeah, offer her a good deal. We can give you what you want.

subtitles.original: A date... with Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: A date... with Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.original: Okay, now you guys are in control. Gigi is the bad cop now.
subtitles.english: Okay, now you guys are in control. Gigi is the bad cop now.

subtitles.original: Answer us right now! Answer us right now!
subtitles.english: Answer us right now! Answer us right now!

subtitles.original: Go crazy, go crazy on her! I'm scared.
subtitles.english: Go crazy, go crazy on her! I'm scared.

subtitles.original: Hey, you! Whoa.
subtitles.english: Hey, you! Whoa.

subtitles.original: A fine woman, it is my lucky day. Chief Raora!
subtitles.english: A fine woman, it is my lucky day. Chief Raora!

subtitles.original: Chief Raora! Oh, Chief Raora! What do you guys think you're doing, huh?
subtitles.english: Chief Raora! Oh, Chief Raora! What do you guys think you're doing, huh?

subtitles.original: But we were doing what you were saying.
subtitles.english: But we were doing what you were saying.

subtitles.original: You useless! You don't do anything in this place!
subtitles.english: You useless! You don't do anything in this place!

subtitles.original: But we were... Why did they hire you, huh? You're so useless!
subtitles.english: But we were... Why did they hire you, huh? You're so useless!

subtitles.original: This person, we have all the evidence, and you still didn't manage to make her tell the truth?!
subtitles.english: This person, we have all the evidence, and you still didn't manage to make her tell the truth?!

subtitles.original: Chief, we are trying our best, okay? We are underpaid, overworked!
subtitles.english: Chief, we are trying our best, okay? We are underpaid, overworked!

subtitles.original: You're embarrassing us in front of the criminal.
subtitles.english: You're embarrassing us in front of the criminal.

subtitles.original: Well, maybe you should do better than this! You're not even listening to me, are you?
subtitles.english: Well, maybe you should do better than this! You're not even listening to me, are you?

subtitles.original: You never fix our coffee machine! And we never get free time off, Raora! Chief Raora, I mean!
subtitles.english: You never fix our coffee machine! And we never get free time off, Raora! Chief Raora, I mean!

subtitles.original: Well, if you work more, maybe you will deserve your coffee machine!
subtitles.english: Well, if you work more, maybe you will deserve your coffee machine!

subtitles.original: Do you like coffee? No.
subtitles.english: Do you like coffee? No.

subtitles.original: Well, what do you want from me? I want it fixed! And you want coffee?! Silence!
subtitles.english: Well, what do you want from me? I want it fixed! And you want coffee?! Silence!

subtitles.original: You know, one of my favorite virtual entertainers, Cecilia Immergreen, she does not like coffee.
subtitles.english: You know, one of my favorite virtual entertainers, Cecilia Immergreen, she does not like coffee.

subtitles.original: Do you remember what did you do in that record?
subtitles.english: Do you remember what did you do in that record?

subtitles.original: Um, I mean, I make up my own stories in my blog.
subtitles.english: Um, I mean, I make up my own stories in my blog.

subtitles.original: Well, your own story with Nerissa Ravencroft, by any chance?
subtitles.english: Well, your own story with Nerissa Ravencroft, by any chance?

subtitles.original: Get her, Boss! Get her, Boss! Wow.
subtitles.english: Get her, Boss! Get her, Boss! Wow.

subtitles.original: You know, Boss, I think you're all put to the test. Yeah, I think you're doing great.
subtitles.english: You know, Boss, I think you're all put to the test. Yeah, I think you're doing great.

subtitles.original: Thank you! Thank you! Thank, thank...
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Thank, thank...

subtitles.original: So you do know Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: So you do know Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.original: I know that her name spelled backwards is Assiren.
subtitles.english: I know that her name spelled backwards is Assiren.

subtitles.original: How do you know that? How do you know that?
subtitles.english: How do you know that? How do you know that?

subtitles.original: Uh, I know many Nerissas because I'm very popular with the ladies.
subtitles.english: Uh, I know many Nerissas because I'm very popular with the ladies.

subtitles.original: Ask her about the photo collection she has in her room.
subtitles.english: Ask her about the photo collection she has in her room.

subtitles.original: We have some things that I want to show you, okay? See this paper right here? Are you gonna show me my shackles, please?
subtitles.english: We have some things that I want to show you, okay? See this paper right here? Are you gonna show me my shackles, please?

subtitles.original: No, no, no. These are all the photos we found in your room that you have taken of Nerissa Ravencroft. Do you recognize these?
subtitles.english: No, no, no. These are all the photos we found in your room that you have taken of Nerissa Ravencroft. Do you recognize these?
